headline: Stock Market Today, March 26: Super Micro Computer Falls After Shareholder Lawsuits Over Smuggling Allegations
summary: On March 26, 2026, investors weighed surging AI-server growth against fresh new lawsuits clouding this data-center leader.

headline: HPE’s HR Chief Explains Using the ‘Placemat’ Technique in the Boardroom
summary: Stacy Dillow, Hewlett Packard Enterprise’s executive vice president and chief people officer, says a simple one-page data summary—and a willingness to ask provocative questions—helped her gain influence with the board during her first 10 months in her role.

raw.headline: HPE’s HR Chief Explains Using the ‘Placemat’ Technique in the Boardroom
raw.summary: Stacy Dillow, Hewlett Packard Enterprise’s executive vice president and chief people officer, says a simple one-page data summary—and a willingness to ask provocative questions—helped her gain influence with the board during her first 10 months in her role.

headline: How HR Leaders Can Deepen Their Influence in the C-Suite
summary: Stacy Dillow, who started her career as a chemical engineer, discusses her path to becoming Hewlett Packard Enterprise chief people officer and the lessons she’s learned along the way. She also shares strategies on board engagement, workforce evolution and AI.

raw.headline: How HR Leaders Can Deepen Their Influence in the C-Suite

headline: VRT Rides on Accelerating Data Center Growth: A Sign for More Upside?
summary: Vertiv rides on surging AI-driven data center demand, with soaring orders, backlog growth, and capacity expansion fueling momentum despite rising competition.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 We Ignore
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 We Ignore
